info.title: smolvm API
info.description: OCI-native microVM runtime API for managing sandboxes, containers, images, and microvms.

post.summary: Execute a command in a microvm.

parameters.name: force
parameters.description: Force delete even if VM is still running

post.summary: Create a container in a sandbox.
Execute a command in a container.
Execute a command in a sandbox.
post.description: This executes directly in the VM (not in a container).

post.summary: Pull an image into a sandbox.

get.summary: Stream sandbox console logs via SSE.

parameters.name: tail
parameters.description: Number of lines to show from the end

404.description: Sandbox or log file not found

post.summary: Run a command in an image.
post.description: This creates a temporary overlay from the image and runs the command.

ContainerExecRequest.description: Request to exec in a container.

ContainerMountSpec.description:
Container mount specification.

Note: The `source` field is the virtiofs tag, which corresponds to
host mounts configured on the sandbox. Tags are assigned in order:
`smolvm0`, `smolvm1`, etc. based on the sandbox's mount configuration.
Use `GET /api/v1/sandboxes/:id` to see the tag-to-path mapping.

source.description:
Virtiofs tag (e.g., "smolvm0", "smolvm1").
These correspond to sandbox mounts in order.

CreateMicrovmRequest.description: Request to create a new microvm.

network.description:
Enable outbound network access (TSI).
Note: Only TCP/UDP supported, not ICMP (ping).

CreateSandboxRequest.description: Request to create a new sandbox.

DeleteQuery.description: Query parameters for delete sandbox endpoint.

force.description:
If true, force delete even if stop fails and VM is still running.
This may orphan the VM process. Default: false.

ExecRequest.description: Request to execute a command in a sandbox.

follow.description: If true, follow the logs (like tail -f). Default: false.

tail.description: Number of lines to show from the end (like tail -n). Default: all.

MicrovmExecRequest.description: Request to execute a command in a microvm.

network.description: Whether outbound network access is enabled.

MountInfo.description: Mount information (for responses, includes virtiofs tag).

tag.description: Virtiofs tag (e.g., "smolvm0"). Use this in container mounts.

network.description:
Enable outbound network access (TSI).
Note: Only TCP/UDP supported, not ICMP (ping).

RestartSpec.description: Restart policy specification for sandbox creation.

RunRequest.description: Request to run a command in an image.

mounts.description: Configured mounts (with virtiofs tags for use in container mounts).

network.description: Whether outbound network access is enabled.

restartCount.description: Number of times this sandbox has been automatically restarted.
